title: Inspiration.
content:
All who have toiled for Art, who've won or lost,
    Sat equal priests at her high Pentecost;
    Only the chrism and sacrament of flame,
    Anointing all, inspired not all the same.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Madison Julius Cawein delivers a powerful performance in "Inspiration."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
